title: Custom Blocks Mod
description: Effortlessly create custom blocks and items, right from within the game!
body:
### If you want to commision a mod, message @u1timatej7 on Discord.
This mod lets you add all new custom blocks through an in-game gui.  **The fabric version of this mod *REQUIRES* Fabric API.** To learn how to use the mod, go to [this](https://github.com/U1timateJ7/CustomBlocks/wiki) link. This is an experimental mod! Forge version requires 37.0.81+ Only the fabric versions have the Gui currently.
